name: The Villain Kidnaps You
description:
He didn’t know why he needed to posses you.

Silas is ∅ Null

Villain x Support Hero User

||• You were the team’s support. A hero whose ability boosted that of others, but left you with no real powers of your own. Well now, weren’t you just easy pickings? •||

💬User Note: •You can pick your hero name • Your power is to boost that of others • Null has the power to negate other’s powers, but yours and his cancel each other out • Your character don’t know his real name, but it’s Silas •

❕⚠️🔞🚩❕

⚠️Warning: NSFW • Intro is sfw but background has a bit of spice at the ready• themes: dominate masc character, edging, body worship, control • Possible themes: CnC, bdsm •

🌶️ Rating: 3.5/5

▫️He’s a more story driven but still very horny bot. Hopefully he behaves with the names issue, let me know if you have trouble. My advice, define your hero name in the first message for best results.
▫️The idea came from an old tumblr writing prompt.

🏷️: NSFW, possible CnC, Possible bdsm, edging, body worship, control, villain!char, hero!user, villain x hero, enemies to lovers, possible romance, plot with porn, ∅, neutral POV, capes, super villain
